_comment: Farcaster Mini App manifest for burgermoney.org. This file is served from /.well-known/farcaster.json. The accountAssociation block is a JSON Farcaster Signature (JFS) proving the project's Farcaster account controls this domain. To generate yours, sign in at https://farcaster.xyz/~/developers/mini-apps/manifest with the Farcaster account you want associated with this Mini App, enter the domain 'burgermoney.org', and paste the three returned values (header, payload, signature) into the accountAssociation object below. Until you do this, the Mini App will work for casting/sharing but cannot be 'added' by users, send notifications, or appear in the Mini App store.

miniapp.name: Burger Money
miniapp.subtitle: Memecoin that feeds the hungry
miniapp.description: A charity-first memecoin on Base. Every trade, every Takeover tile, every Uniswap LP fee funds verified hunger-relief donations and onchain $BURGERS buyback-and-burn.
miniapp.ogDescription: A charity-first memecoin on Base — all revenue funds hunger relief and buyback-and-burn.
